description: Agent-level action invocation and execution coverage for plugin-cex Binance endpoints.

questions.question: Using Binance, get my account balances and summarize all non-zero assets only.
Using Binance, fetch my open orders across symbols.
Using Binance, fetch my latest BTC-USDT orders with a small limit and include side information.
Using Binance, fetch my latest fills for BTC-USDT and show time, side, and quantity.
Using Binance, cancel order id 123456789 if it exists and report the cancellation result.
Using Binance, create a BUY market order for BTC-USDT with quote size 1.00 USDT and ask for approval before execution.
Using Binance, place a SELL limit GTC order for BTC-USDT with base size 0.0001 at price 150000 and request approval.
Using Binance, place a BUY stop-limit GTC order for BTC-USDT with base size 0.0001, stop 50000, limit 50500, and request approval.
